discount_applications_countdown_check.name: discount_applications_countdown_check

discount_code_redemptions_lifecycle_chec.name: discount_code_redemptions_lifecycle_check
discount_code_redemptions_lifecycle_chec.value:
(
        "discount_code_redemptions"."state" = 'reserved'
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."redeemed_at" is null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."released_at" is null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."release_reason" is null
      ) or (
        "discount_code_redemptions"."state" = 'redeemed'
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."redeemed_at" is not null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."released_at" is null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."release_reason" is null
      ) or (
        "discount_code_redemptions"."state" = 'released'
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."redeemed_at" is null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."released_at" is not null
        and "discount_code_redemptions"."release_reason" is not null
        and btrim("discount_code_redemptions"."release_reason") <> ''
      )

discount_codes_valid_window_check.name: discount_codes_valid_window_check
discount_codes_valid_window_check.value: "discount_codes"."valid_from" is null or "discount_codes"."valid_until" is null or "discount_codes"."valid_until" > "discount_codes"."valid_from"

discounts_adjustment_variant_check.name: discounts_adjustment_variant_check
discounts_adjustment_variant_check.value:
(
        "discounts"."percentage_basis_points" is not null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_value" is null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_exponent" is null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_currency" is null
      ) or (
        "discounts"."percentage_basis_points" is null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_value" is not null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_exponent" is not null
        and "discounts"."fixed_amount_currency" is not null
      )

payment_attempts_failure_code_check.name: payment_attempts_failure_code_check
payment_attempts_failure_code_check.value: "payment_attempts"."state" not in ('failed', 'cancelled', 'expired') or "payment_attempts"."failure_code" is not null

workspace_reservations_hold_id_check.name: workspace_reservations_hold_id_check
workspace_reservations_hold_id_check.value: "workspace_reservations"."reservation_state" not in ('held', 'confirming', 'confirmed', 'cancelling', 'cancelled', 'cancellation_failed') or "workspace_reservations"."dotypos_reservation_id" is not null

workspace_reservations_fulfillment_faile.name: workspace_reservations_fulfillment_failed_check
workspace_reservations_fulfillment_faile.value: "workspace_reservations"."fulfillment_state" <> 'failed' or ("workspace_reservations"."fulfillment_failed_at" is not null and "workspace_reservations"."fulfillment_failure_code" is not null)
